Description: Optional. Root element of the fields related to a contestant - this element is optional (it may not always be returned in the feed - for example if the match is scheduled but contestants are not yet known, in which case the record will be updated once known).

attributes.Description: Required. Unique ID (UUID) of the contestant
Optional. Unique Opta Core contestant ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta Core legacy ID. Empty string if the ID does not exist.
Optional. Unique Opta contestant ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta legacy ID. Empty string if the ID does not exist.
Required. The name of the contestant
Optional. The short name commonly used to refer to the contestant
Required. The official name of the contestant
Optional. The 3-character code used for the name of the contestant - it is often used on TV scoreboards
Required. Indicates the position of the contestant as either the home or away side, in the list of contestants
attributes.Type: String - one of the following: home | away
